completed_tasks.name: Rewound premature roadmap + Phase-1 discussion; re-opened primitive selection; auth baseline (public+private) + distribution forms
4-architecture comparison + full CVE/D1-D4 security review; persisted ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md + control ledger C1-C18
6-member advisor panel (3 board + 3 critic) + triage survivors applied
Targeted research resolved: GHCR atomic-create (unavailable/low-severity), backstop host-detection (fail-closed), Nx PUT floor (hard 200)

remaining_tasks.name: Run /gsd:spike on the reader/cross-context adapter (GHCR/OCI vs GitHub Releases) against the FOUND-01 forward-merits ledger
Re-derive REQUIREMENTS.md traceability + ROADMAP.md from the settled reader decision
Plan + execute phases (test safety net, trust/modes, docs)

human_actions_pending.action: The spike does hands-on GHCR + Releases experiments; ensure `gh`/GHCR auth is available (docker/oras login to ghcr.io, a token with read:packages/write:packages for the throwaway test package)

decisions.decision: Architecture = one backend per process via selectBackend + trust input; default = Actions-cache CI-RW only; reader/publish/cleanup is opt-in + reader-specific (not port-isolated)

Write-trust = allowlist-only (default-deny, no denylist); pull_request/release on only where GitHub's untrusted-default-branch guard exists, host-detected from GITHUB_SERVER_URL (github.com/*.ghe.com ON; all GHES OFF, fail-closed, no caller flag)
decisions.rationale: CREEP CVE-2025-36852; in-code gate is fork-spoofable defense-in-depth

decisions.decision: Sync gate = separate predicate = {push, schedule} only, test-locked to reject all else
decisions.rationale: syncing a PR/dispatch-influenced entry into a shared store recreates the CREEP precondition

decisions.decision: No content signing for CREEP (ineffective); no LRU manifest; digest-pin iff GHCR; OS-namespace the store by default (CORR-01)
OPEN: reader adapter GHCR/OCI vs Releases
decisions.rationale: purely empirical now (latency/cost/caps/cold-read-fan-out/size-ceiling/remediation) - the paper unknowns (atomicity, backstop detection, Nx floor) are all resolved

next_action: Run /gsd:spike for the reader/cross-context adapter (GHCR/OCI vs GitHub Releases), scoped to the FOUND-01 forward-merits ledger in .planning/ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md. Decide the reader on forward merits ONLY - the current implementation is a spike/PoC (sunk cost = 0).
context_notes: All foundational decisions + the CREEP control ledger (C1-C18) are persisted in .planning/ARCHITECTURE-DECISION.md and triple-reviewed (D1-D4 security review + 6-member advisor panel + independent Sonnet /lz-security-review + targeted research). Exactly ONE decision remains open: the reader adapter (FOUND-01), and it is now purely empirical. Do NOT weight 'already built' (spike/PoC). Do NOT reopen the resolved-on-paper items: GHCR atomic create-if-absent is unavailable but low-severity (C2-covered); the write-trust backstop is host-detected fail-closed; the Nx PUT floor is a hard 200 (Nx 21+). CREEP (CVE-2025-36852) is the core threat; the control ledger is the security spec.
